title: Prism Mod Menu
description: ✦ Prism Mod Menu  Super Cool Animations ⚡
body:
# ✨ Prism Mod Menu

**[Prism Mod Menu]** isn't just another mod menu — it's a *visual experience*. ✨

Tired of static, boring menus? **Prism** transforms your game interface with **smooth animations, modern UI elements, and fluid transitions**.

Every click, every transition, every interaction is designed to feel **responsive, clean, and premium**. The goal is simple:

> *Make your mod menu feel modern and professional.* 💎

---

# 📸 Gallery

*Preview the interface here:*

🔗 ![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55a0f1afc9f57e2260c36bb8ec1f3b31b7d1668f.png)

---

# ✨ Features

| Icon | Feature | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| 🎬 | **Cinematic Animations** | Smooth animated transitions and fluid UI movement for a modern experience. |
| 🌈 | **Rainbow Background** | Dynamic rainbow background option for a vibrant and stylish menu. |
| 💎 | **Professional Display** | Clean layouts, polished typography, and balanced UI spacing. |
| ⚙️ | **Configure Button Support** | Configure button now works properly using the configuration system used by Mod Menu. |
| 🚀 | **Lag Improvements** | Reduced lag and smoother navigation through the mod list. |
| 🎨 | **Modern UI Design** | Designed to look sleek, polished, and visually satisfying. |

---

# 🚀 What's New — Version 3.0

*A major update focused on visuals, performance, and stability.*

### ✨ New Features

* 🌈 **Rainbow Animated Background**

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1c3ff4b74b3f24fb1d41d4a37da783536943e30.png)

* 🎬 **More UI Animations**
* 🎨 **Improved visual polish**

---

### ⚙️ Improvements

* ⚙️ **Configure Button Fixed**
* 🧩 Integrated configuration support compatible with Mod Menu
* ⚡ Improved UI responsiveness

---

### 🛠 Fixes

* Fixed **Configure button not opening settings**
* Fixed **menu lag issues**
* Fixed minor **UI glitches and animation bugs**

---

# 🎯 Project Vision

Prism focuses on three main ideas:

* ✨ **Smooth animations**
* 💎 **Professional design**
* ⚡ **Fast and responsive UI**

The project aims to deliver a **next-generation mod menu experience** while remaining compatible with systems used by Mod Menu.

---

# 🔮 Future Plans

* 🖼️ Custom icon system
* 🎨 Additional themes
* ⚡ Even smoother animations
* 🧩 More customization options

---

# 🔗 Stay Connected

---

🙏 Thank You!

Your support helps improve Prism with every update.  
More features, more polish, and better animations are coming soon.

**Happy Modding!** 🎮✨
